chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 2526 of 2023 Crl. Bail Application No. 2531 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 05-12-2023 Syeda Riffat Bano Advocate along with applicant Muhammad Imran Khan on bail in BA No. 2526/2023 Mr. Waqar Memon Advocate along with applicant Muhammad Umar Ayaz on bail in BA No. 2531/2023 Mr. Muhammad Ayub Awan Advocate for the Complainant Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-. Omar Sial, J: Applicants Muhammad Imran Khan and Muhammad Umar Ayaz, has separately sought pre-arrest bail in crime number 366 of 2023 registered under section 420, 34 P.P.C. at the Soldier Bazar police station. Earlier, their applications seeking bail were dismissed on 04.11.2023 by the learned 4thAdditional Sessions Judge, Karachi-East. 2. I have heard the learned counsel for the applicants and the learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State duly assisted by the learned counsel for the Complainant. 3. Mst. Farhat Bano, the complainant, in the FIR has alleged that her husband Muhammad Imran Khan, without her permission, sold her car to Muhammad Umar Ayaz by preparing a fake transfer letter with her forged signature. Admittedly, the applicants have been charged under section 420 PPC which is a bailable offence, therefore, the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants are confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Amjad PS
